results.title: HotpotQA Source/Evidence Extraction Challenge

results.title: PyOD Repository Reproducibility Audit
results.humanReadableSummary: A public repository reproducibility audit of PyOD found strong documentation and packaging signals, but remains partial because the batch did not install dependencies or execute the upstream test suite.

results.title: UCI Auto MPG Public Dataset Quality Audit
results.humanReadableSummary: A public-safe audit of the UCI Auto MPG dataset found 398 rows, 9 fields, 6 missing horsepower tokens, no full-row duplicates, and a type-aware audit that outperformed schema-only checks for missing-value detection.

results.title: UCI Occupancy Detection Benchmark Challenge
results.humanReadableSummary: A held-out UCI Occupancy Detection benchmark challenge rejected two simple sensor-vote challengers because a light-threshold baseline dominated them on F1 and balanced accuracy.

results.title: Batch 20 Protocol-Risk Paper-Grade Frontier Result

results.title: Batch 21 Protocol-Card Replay Week 1
